ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the stock market data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price reached during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The actual closing price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* The adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The volume of trades on the given date */,
  "change" TEXT /* The change in price from the previous day */,
  "percent_change" TEXT /* The percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of trades for the day */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "market_id" TEXT /* The market where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the indicator was calculated */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the indicator is for */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., RSI, Moving Average) */,
  "value" TEXT /* The calculated value of the indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The period over which the indicator was calculated */,
  "source_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific stock_data entry used for the calculation */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* The version of the algorithm used for the calculation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Any additional parameters used for the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_source_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_data_id") REFERENCES stock_data ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES stock_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the stock belongs to */,
  "market" TEXT /* The market where the stock is traded */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has access */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., view, edit, full) */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* The expiration date for the user's access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last update to the access entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the prediction is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_price" TEXT /* The predicted price of the stock */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* The machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* The confidence score of the prediction */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* The version of the machine learning model used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Any additional parameters used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the report is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Daily Report, Technical Analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stored report */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last update to the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* The size of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user whose portfolio is being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the performance data was recorded */,
  "portfolio_value" TEXT /* The value of the user's portfolio */,
  "returns" TEXT /* The returns of the user's portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* The name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last update to the portfolio performance data */,
  "initial_investment" TEXT /* The initial investment amount */,
  "current_investment" TEXT /* The current investment amount */,
  "total_returns" TEXT /* The total returns of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
